title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: Atomic Habits provides a proven framework for improving every day. It explains how small habits compound into remarkable results.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Deep Work teaches how to focus without distraction in a world full of interruptions.Deep Work teaches how to focus without distraction in a world full of interruptions.

title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: Timeless lessons on wealth, greed and happiness explaining how people think about money.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
author: Robert Kiyosaki
description: A classic personal finance book explaining the difference between assets and liabilities.

title: Ikigai
author: Hector Garcia
description: Ikigai explores the Japanese secret to a long and happy life.

title: Think and Grow Rich
author: Napoleon Hill
description: One of the most influential personal development books ever written.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical story about following your dreams and listening to your heart.

title: Start With Why
author: Simon Sinek
description: Explains how great leaders inspire action by focusing on the 'why'.
